heroTitle: Home & Doorstep Physiotherapy in Hitech City, Hyderabad
heroSubtitle: Expert physiotherapists at your doorstep. No travel. No waiting rooms. Just recovery.
heroDescription: Professional physiotherapy services delivered to your home in Hitech City and surrounding areas. Book your session today for personalized care.

conditions.title: Back Pain and Lower Back Pain
conditions.description: Prolonged sitting at poorly set up workstations is the leading cause of lower back pain among Hitech City professionals. Our home physiotherapists assess your posture, identify muscle imbalances, and design an evidence-based treatment program that addresses root causes, not just symptoms.

conditions.title: Neck Pain and Cervical Stiffness
conditions.description: Constant laptop and mobile screen use creates forward head posture and muscle tension in the cervical spine. Our doorstep physiotherapy sessions target these with manual therapy, stretching, and corrective exercises designed specifically for desk workers.

conditions.title: Knee Pain and Joint Problems
conditions.description: Whether caused by arthritis, ligament weakness, or injury, knee pain limits daily movement significantly. Home physiotherapy strengthens muscles supporting the knee joint and improves stability without the added stress of traveling to a clinic.

conditions.title: Post-Surgery Rehabilitation
conditions.description: After orthopedic surgeries like knee replacement, hip replacement, rotator cuff repair, or spinal surgery, travelling to a clinic is often painful and risky. Our physiotherapists bring structured rehabilitation directly to your home, ensuring safe and progressive recovery.

conditions.title: Sciatica and Nerve Pain
conditions.description: Sciatica causes shooting pain from the lower back through the legs. Our doorstep physiotherapy sessions for sciatica focus on nerve mobilization, core strengthening, and posture correction that reduces nerve compression over time.

conditions.title: Shoulder Pain and Frozen Shoulder
conditions.description: Shoulder conditions like frozen shoulder, rotator cuff injuries, and impingement respond well to consistent physiotherapy. Our home physiotherapists work on restoring range of motion progressively through targeted manual therapy and graduated exercise.

conditions.title: Sports Injury Rehabilitation
conditions.description: Athletes and fitness enthusiasts in Hitech City dealing with ligament sprains, muscle strains, or joint injuries benefit from structured home rehabilitation. We design sport-specific recovery programs that restore function and reduce re-injury risk.

conditions.title: Neurological Rehabilitation
conditions.description: For patients recovering from stroke, paralysis, or other neurological conditions, doorstep physiotherapy is often the safest and most practical option. Our therapists are experienced in neuro-rehabilitation techniques that support functional recovery in a familiar home environment.

whyChooseReasons: No commute or parking stress after a long workday
Therapy in a familiar environment that aids recovery

itProfessionalSection.title: Physiotherapy for IT Professionals in Hitech City
itProfessionalSection.description: Hitech City houses some of Hyderabad's largest technology companies and software parks. Desk-based, screen-intensive work creates a predictable pattern of physical problems our physiotherapists understand and treat regularly.
issues: Chronic lower back pain from prolonged sitting
Wrist and forearm pain from keyboard and mouse use
Forward head posture and rounded shoulders
Ergonomic advice for home and office workstation setup
itProfessionalSection.additionalInfo: We also provide guidance on movement breaks, desk stretches, and strengthening exercises that fit into a busy work schedule without requiring gym access.

howItWorks.title: Book Online or Call Us
howItWorks.description: Visit www.rehabb.care and select your condition and preferred slot in under 2 minutes. Or call/WhatsApp +91 96524 68777 and we will help you book.

howItWorks.title: Assessment at Your Home
howItWorks.description: Your physiotherapist visits and conducts a detailed physical assessment covering posture, range of motion, pain points, and lifestyle factors.

howItWorks.title: Personalized Treatment Plan
howItWorks.description: A customized therapy plan is created with clear recovery milestones so you know exactly what to expect.

howItWorks.title: Regular Doorstep Sessions
howItWorks.description: Sessions include manual therapy, therapeutic exercises, stretching, posture correction, and pain management as needed.

howItWorks.title: Progress Monitoring
howItWorks.description: Progress is tracked and the plan adjusted throughout to keep recovery on track.

faqs.question: Is home physiotherapy as effective as going to a clinic?
faqs.answer: Yes. Research consistently shows that one-on-one home physiotherapy produces outcomes comparable to clinic-based treatment for most musculoskeletal conditions. The added advantage of doorstep physiotherapy is that your therapist can assess your actual living environment, workstation, and daily movement patterns, which a clinic visit cannot replicate.

faqs.question: How many sessions will I need?
faqs.answer: This depends on your condition and how your body responds to treatment. Acute conditions may resolve in 4 to 6 sessions. Chronic problems or post-surgery rehabilitation may require 10 to 20 sessions or more. Your therapist will give you a realistic estimate after the initial home assessment.

faqs.question: What does a doorstep physiotherapy session involve?
faqs.answer: A typical session lasts 45 to 60 minutes and includes manual therapy, guided exercises, stretching, and pain management techniques. Your therapist brings the necessary equipment to your home for each session.

faqs.question: Can physiotherapy help me avoid surgery?
faqs.answer: In many cases, yes. Conditions like knee osteoarthritis, rotator cuff tears, sciatica, and lumbar disc problems often respond well to structured physiotherapy, reducing or eliminating the need for surgery. This will be discussed honestly after your home assessment.

faqs.question: How do I book a home physiotherapy session in Hitech City?
faqs.answer: Visit www.rehabb.care, enter your location and condition, and choose a convenient slot. You will receive confirmation and your therapist's details immediately. You can also call or WhatsApp us on +91 96524 68777 to book your doorstep physiotherapy session directly.

faqs.question: Do you provide physiotherapy for elderly patients at home?
faqs.answer: Yes. Doorstep physiotherapy is particularly beneficial for elderly patients who face difficulty travelling. We provide home-based rehabilitation for arthritis, post-fracture recovery, balance issues, and post-stroke rehabilitation across Hitech City and nearby areas.
